description: US behavior change platform for weight management, diabetes prevention, and hypertension. Mobile app with psychology-based programs. Sold directly to consumers and through employers/health plans.
business_model: B2C/B2B - Behavior change programs to consumers and employers
key_investors: Sequoia Capital, Silver Lake, Samsung, others
competitive_advantage: Psychology-based approach, massive user base, clinical validation

varden_fit.rationale: Behavior change platform - could complement occupational health programs
